title: Facebook Marketplace Seller Manager input
description: Marketplace-first management workflow for Facebook sellers. Default mode produces a non-empty reply queue without credentials. The product is intentionally not scrape-only: it models inbox operations, stale follow-ups, listing actions, and session-readiness for later browser-backed execution.

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Choose the workflow you want to run.

replyStyle.title: Reply style
replyStyle.description: Choose the default tone for generated seller replies.

replyTemplate.title: Custom reply template
replyTemplate.prefill: Hola {{buyerName}}, sigue disponible {{listingTitle}}. Si te encaja, te confirmo entrega hoy.

threads.title: Buyer threads
threads.description: Conversation rows for Marketplace, direct Messenger, or group follow-up workflows. Use this in conversation_inventory, build_reply_queue, or build_follow_up_queue mode.

prefill.lastMessage: Hola Zimo, como te va el puente?

followUpDaysThreshold.title: Follow-up threshold in days
followUpDaysThreshold.description: Threads older than this threshold become follow-up candidates in build_follow_up_queue mode.

listings.title: Seller listings
listings.description: Listing rows used to build an operations queue. Use this in listing_ops_plan mode.

cookiesJson.title: Facebook cookies JSON
cookiesJson.description: Paste exported facebook.com cookies JSON from Cookie-Editor or a similar browser tool. Used only in session_audit mode to validate whether a browser-backed seller workflow can be attached later.
